name: Shanghai Guao Electronic Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Guao Electronic Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, marketing, and servicing of financial equipment. It offers banknote (coin) sorter, banknote sort assembly line, banknote discriminator, banknote sorting and binding machine, banknote binder, multi-currency banknote detector, banknote sorting and dispensing machine, full-auto banknote strapping machine, ATM, CRS, smart business terminal, bill teller system, receipt collecting system, etc., as well as currency identification instruments and counterfeit currency discriminators under the Gooao brand name. The company offers its products through sales network in China, Europe, America, Africa, Asia, and Oceania. Shanghai Guao Electronic Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.
